first_run.rationale: The scores are identical. The justifications, strengths, and primary concerns are substantively the same, with only minor rephrasing that is typical of run-to-run noise. The one notable difference in the third-listed concern (lack of advanced degree vs. mobile platform focus) is not plausibly connected to the change in work location from various international cities to the United States. The overall assessment of the candidate's fit for the role remains unchanged.
